ops.body: Done in dcfaa47 (PR #2, v0.31.0): ctx.Err() checked before the mutex and again after acquiring it in embed Encode — a cancelled caller returns promptly and nothing queues behind a doomed call. WithCloseOnContextDone deliberately NOT enabled (hot-path tax); in-flight WASM calls run to completion by design (<15 ms), noted in a comment. Tests: pre-cancelled and cancel-while-waiting on a zero-value Engine (proves the early return), no sleeps.
